response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience with the mandatory C++/Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain requirements. Their recent roles at Google and Meta focus on full-stack and AI tooling, which diverges from the core needs of this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with modern software development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
Strong communication skills and knowledge-sharing, as evidenced by workshops and talks.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments).
No explicit mention of SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development in recent roles.
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains.
